posts.raw_content:
Tumbler Ridge Secondary School (February 10, 2026): A 19-year-old male tranny opened fire at a high school in Tumbler Ridge, British Columbia, killing eight people at the school and two others at a nearby home. Over 25 people were injured. 


Annunciation Church/Catholic School (August 27, 2025): Robin Westman, a 23-year-old male tranny, killed two children and injured 17 others at a Catholic school and church in Minneapolis, Minnesota. 


The Covenant School (March 27, 2023): Aiden Hale (born Audrey Hale), a 28-year-old female tranny, killed three children and three adults at a private Christian school in Nashville, Tennessee. 


Club Q Nightclub (November 19, 2022): Anderson Lee Aldrich, a male nonbinary killed five people and injured 25 others at an LGBTQ+ nightclub in Colorado Springs, Colorado. Aldrich's defense attorneys stated in court filings that their client identifies as nonbinary. 


STEM School Highlands Ranch (May 7, 2019): Alec McKinney, a female tranny student, and another student killed one classmate and injured eight others at a school in Highlands Ranch, Colorado. 


Aberdeen Rite Aid Warehouse (September 20, 2018): Snochia Moseley, a male tranny, killed three people and injured three others at a distribution center in Aberdeen, Maryland, before taking his own life
